content_body:
Easy to find from the airport. It was the perfect spot for 3 ladies from Canada to each have their own space yet a beautiful common area to relax and unwind after our busy conference. The house had everything we needed. The beds were amazingly comfortable.

Highlights:

  • Ponce City Market (walk there during the day and eat the guacamole and chips at Menaro...yum!)
  • 4th & Swift—Delicious!
  • Peach Tree Trolley Tour (highly recommend for your first day to get oriented)
  • World of Cake
  • Aquarium
  • Martin Luther King Center & House
  • Food: Fat Matt's Rib Shack, Ria's Bluebird Cafe, Sweet Georgia Juke Joint, Ted Turner's Bison House

We love Atlanta! Use Uber or Lyft to go anywhere!
title: We Love Atlanta!
